title: prosagoreuo #4316
definition:
1) to speak to, to address, accost, salute
 2) esp. to address or accost by some name, call by name
 3) to give a name in public, to style
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to speak to, to address, accost, salute
 2) esp. to address or accost by some name, call by name
 3) to give a name in public, to style

    NASB:  to address, hence to call by name:
